input.tenant_message: All the outlets and the overhead light in my second bedroom stopped working yesterday afternoon. None of the other rooms are affected. I checked the breaker panel and nothing looks tripped. I tried resetting all the breakers anyway but still nothing. It's been out for almost 24 hours now.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a licensed electrician to diagnose the loss of power to the second bedroom. The likely causes are a tripped GFCI outlet that feeds the circuit downstream, a failed breaker that does not visibly trip, or a loose connection at the panel or junction box. Tenant should also check all GFCI outlets in bathrooms and kitchen that may be on the same circuit.
